title: Grenfell: In the Words of Survivors
original_title: National Theatre at Home: Grenfell: In the Words of Survivors
overview: A powerful new verbatim play from the testimony of residents at the heart of the Grenfell Tower tragedy.  Six years on, interviews conducted with a group of survivors and bereaved reveal the impact of the multiple failures that led to a national disaster, asking: how do we stop this ever happening again?
